task_completion.description: Verify that the BlueMail application is open and the compose email window is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BlueMail application interface is visible with a new message or compose window open.

task_completion.description: Verify that the recipient email address is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' or recipient field contains exactly 'marketing@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the email subject is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' field contains exactly 'Monthly Report Summary - January 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the email body contains a professional summary including sales figures, marketing campaign results, and upcoming initiatives.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body text area contains a message mentioning keywords like 'sales', 'marketing', and 'campaign'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the email is either sent or saved as a draft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Send' button, clicks a 'Save as Draft' option, or a confirmation toast/message appears indicating the email was sent or saved.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual BlueMail application rather than a generic text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: BlueMail UI elements, branding, and standard email composition fields are visible, rather than a plain text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing command-line email sending tools (like mail, sendmail, or curl) are used to complete the task.

integrity.description: Ensure the text was entered into the GUI fields properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text appears properly formatted inside the designated input fields (To, Subject, Body) of the BlueMail compose window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected recipient: 'marketing@example.com'. Expected subject: 'Monthly Report Summary - January 2024'. Expected body keywords: 'sales', 'marketing', 'campaign'.
